title: \(\mathrm{Out}(F_n)\)
text:
Motivation
There is a natural map \(\mathrm{Out}(F_n) \to \mathrm{GL}_n(\mathbb{Z})\) given by abelianization. This map is onto. And in special case when \(n = 2\), this map becomes isomorphism.
Finding the structure of \(\mathrm{Out}(F_n)\) and \(\mathrm{Aut}(F_n)\) may simplify some group theoretic calculations.

title: \(\mathrm{Out}(F_n)\)

title: Yanshu Wang
text:
Research Experience

Mitacs Globalink Research Internship, Mentored by Professor Maxence Mayrand, Université de SherbrookeMay 2025 – Aug 2025

Construct new GKP code from the Abelian varieties on the cyclotomic field and compute the decomposition of the correspondent clifford gate as H-gate, S-gate and CNOT-gate.




Independent Study mentored by Professor Vasily Dolgushev, Temple UniversityJan 2025 – Current

Revisit the gentle version \(\widehat{\mathsf{GT}}_{gen}\) of the Grothendieck-Teichmueller group \(\widehat{\mathsf{GT}}\) and introduce a more streamlined version of the groupoid \(\mathsf{GTSh}\) of \(\mathsf{GT}\)-shadows. The paper is in progress.

Polymath Jr., OnlineJun 2024 – Sep 2024

Our group gives algebraic and complex analytic approaches to computing an affine model for \(K_9\) dessin.
